title: NRI Rajesh K. Gupta Named UCSD Data Sciences Dean
snippet: NRI Rajesh K. Gupta, a renowned computer scientist and academic leader, has been named founding dean of the newly established School of Computing, Information and Data Sciences (SCIDS) at UC San Diego.
match_reason: websearch (press_quote) — NRI Internet coverage of Gupta's SCIDS dean appointment, published July 13, 2025.
